microsoft_ft: Owned end-to-end discovery, execution, and delivery to scale Azure's recovery validation from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, sustaining 45+ annual drills and driving **$14M+ impact** for Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product vision, roadmap, and self-service authoring/scheduling workflows that cut operational toil **30%** and set a new bar for how teams create and stage validation content.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing surface, going from zero to one to ship a rack-level drill program in **4 months** with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a model for continuous validation.

Drove product decisions through daily customer discovery, directing **14 cross-org executions** under executive visibility and serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**.

Built an internal **AI agent** and restructured agent-and-human planning workflows end to end, reducing planning cycle time **39%** and increasing drill capacity **21%** by automating drafting, review, and approval steps.

Partnered cross-functionally with engineering and design through ambiguity, writing specs, sitting on customer calls, and digging into broken production workflows to create clarity and push the team to **ship at a relentless pace**.
microsoft_2023: Owned discovery for an **AI-assisted** code generation surface, running 11+ customer interviews with Azure service teams to validate workflow gaps and translate feedback directly into roadmap decisions for intent-based YAML generation.

Drove product adoption of **agentic content workflows** by leading user demos and training, growing utilization across **14 teams** and saving 37 engineering hours monthly through better content creation and review tooling.

Migrated documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** system, defining metadata standards that cut content lookup time **83%** and improved how teams find, stage, and reuse published material at scale.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M** in accelerated revenue and launched regions **28% faster** by owning a unified automation prioritization framework and securing cross-functional alignment across **140+ teams** through structured discovery.

Drove a zero-to-one product strategy to eliminate launch toil, running discovery with 20+ service teams to quantify **81 hours** of manual effort per region and building a roadmap to automate the critical content and config paths.

Shipped a **Power BI dashboard** giving leadership real-time visibility into operational toil across **140+ teams**, enabling them to target the highest-impact automation gaps and prioritize support where workflows broke down.
amazon_robotics: Defined the legacy OS migration strategy and mapped dependencies across **1,200+ stations** to deliver a **2,000+ unit pilot** with **zero operational downtime**, owning the rollout plan end to end under tight ambiguity.
Led Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize a broken developer intake workflow in production.

Drove alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to ship automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle **25%** by rolling up sleeves to unblock the team and push delivery.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings **26%** by owning the end-to-end scoping, review, and invoicing lifecycle for **200+ monthly proposals**, designing a new CRM workflow for how content moved from draft to client-facing publish.
Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost **13%** and lifted conversions **2.7%** by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google profile against measured user behavior.

Improved leadership pricing models by running profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records** to surface and seal margin leaks, turning raw data into actionable product and pricing decisions.

tailoring_notes: Reframed Microsoft FT around CMS-adjacent themes: content creation/staging/review/publish, agent-and-human workflows, and end-to-end product ownership (discovery→execution→delivery) to mirror the JD.
Emphasized 0→1 / zero-to-one building and AI-native/agentic workflows throughout, since the role builds an AI-native CMS from the ground up.
Surfaced 'roll up your sleeves' signals (specs, customer calls, broken production workflows) and 'play on offense' energy to match the Who You Are section.
Led every bullet with a strong action verb and 5+ years of product depth signal; prioritized skills list around content workflows and AI/agent tooling.
